title: Java System.in, System.out and System.err
summary: The Java System.in, System.out and System.err streams provide a simple way to send data into a Java application, and output data from a Java app too. This tutorial has been clarified.
content: The Java System.in, System.out and System.err streams provide a simple way to send data into a Java application, and output data from a Java app too. This tutorial has been clarified.
